summary: Products Stock Display and Branch Filter Feature Testing - All features verified working correctly. Backend APIs return aggregated stock, branch count, and support branch_id filter. Frontend Products page (/produk) displays stock with color-coded status, shows branch count, and filter panel with branch/brand filters works as expected. Quick Purchase shows correct stock note message.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend products.py lines 94-175 correctly implements branch_id filter with stock aggregation from product_stocks collection
Frontend Products.jsx properly displays stock with branches_count when no branch filter, and branch_stock when filtered
Stock status color coding correctly implemented: Aman (green) > min_stock, Menipis (yellow) <= min_stock, Habis (red) = 0
data-testid attributes properly implemented for toggle-filters, branch-filter, brand-filter, product-search, category-filter
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Products page (/produk) fully tested for stock display and filters. PRD002=278 stock (2 branches), PXLA5K=1100 stock (1 branch). Branch filter '3 FRONT' shows 0 stock for all products. Quick Purchase stock note message verified.

products_list_aggregated_stock.evidence: PRD002 shows 278 stock, PXLA5K shows 1100 stock - aggregated from product_stocks collection

products_list_branch_count.evidence: Shows '2 cabang', '41 cabang', '1 cabang', '0 cabang' below stock numbers

products_stock_status_color_coding.evidence: Aman (green) for stock > min_stock, Habis (red) for stock = 0

branch_filter_dropdown_shows_branches.evidence: Shows 103 branches including '3 FRONT', '3 KIOS LAMPIHONG', etc.

branch_filter_shows_branch_stock.evidence: Selecting '3 FRONT' shows 0 stock for all products in that branch

header_changes_when_branch_filtered.evidence: Header changes to 'Stok (Cabang)' when branch filter is active

branch_filter_notice_message.evidence: Shows 'Menampilkan stok untuk: 3 FRONT' in amber text

reset_filter_button.evidence: Reset Filter button clears branch and brand filters

quick_purchase_stock_note.evidence: Shows 'Stok bertambah setelah Terima Barang' below SIMPAN PO button

brand_filter_input.evidence: data-testid='brand-filter' input filters products by brand

api_tests.test_02_products_list_aggregated_stock: PASS - Products return with stock and branches_count
api_tests.test_03_products_list_with_branch_filter: PASS - branch_id filter returns branch-specific stock
api_tests.test_06_verify_specific_product_stock: PASS - PRD002 and PXLA5K have expected stock
api_tests.test_08_product_detail_stock: PASS - Product detail returns stock across branches
api_tests.test_09_quick_purchase_endpoints: PASS - All Quick Purchase related endpoints available
